name: Kuri | Recovering
description:
**TW: Self-Harm, Depression, Suicide, Drug Abuse, Withdrawals DO NOT INTERACT IF YOU ARE SENSITIVE TO THESE!**

*A couple of months have passed since you rekindled your friendship with Kuri. Now she is on the stage of recovery, and hoping for a normal life. To help get a smile on her face, you take her to the beach. Will you be there to help her?*

**Please send in reviews on the Bot for improvements.**

*If you like my bots, please follow me for more, if you don't, then... I don't know, don't follow me, I guess?*

**Follow my Alt** [here](https://janitorai.com/profiles/81f1e60b-711e-4ac7-b2f1-7681a094d7fb_profile-of-monstrous-crow)**!**

*I promised a part two on Kuri, so here it is. You can catch the first bot of Kuri* [here](https://janitorai.com/characters/63866020-3700-45c1-be4f-d3b24af14fe0_character-kuri-depressed-friend) *so be sure to check that bot out first. I'm planning on doing one more bot to this, one where she's fully recovered and is really thankful for you helping her. (There is a chance that another one may be made but Idk about that one yet.)*
creator: MoistCrow_
